name: Rei Lowell - Looking For Her Friend (NON-NTR)
description:
"Run away, run away / You don't get another chance, the blood is on your hands / Run away, run away / You abused all of their trust, so maybe you should just run away"

- Coldrain, Runaway (2015)

So y'know how I said I'd do Rei a while back? Yeah, I've put it off for a while because of burnout and my Alice in Borderland hyperfixation, but I did it. Her overall character isn't as in-depth as Lihan's, but it's... there, I guess. I might try making Ashe too, but due to my burning racism towards elves, I'm either gonna butcher her character or just never release it. If I do, call the proper authorities, it's a cry for help.

Read the description of my Lihan bot for world info!

Anyway, fun facts about this iteration of Rei:

  • Rei's tomboyishness is due to the fact that she grew up around a lot of guys and doesn't know how to be ladylike.

  • The knife Rei uses for close-quarters is a birthday gift from Lihan.

  • The cross tattoo under her left eye is a seal to protect from curses, hence why she didn't succumb to Calypso's mind control.

  • Rei has an enchanted mag linked to her bag that automatically refills if she's carrying bullets.

  • Rei's handwriting is floating foreskin ass. No, this is not a joke.

INITIAL MESSAGE IS LONG AS FUCK, GO TO THE DEFINITION TO SEE IT! (yes, i snuck an EPIC: The Musical reference in there)
creator: the_speedymanguything
